case_title: JOSEPH B ENGLE VS. BEST OF CHINA.COM, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ENGLE, JOSEPH B AS TO DEFENDANT BEST OF CHINA.COM, INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ENGLE, JOSEPH B RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEST OF CHINA.COM, INC. $9,855.98 PRINCIPAL, $75.78 INTEREST, $104.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,035.76, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
